interactions.name: header-get-started-hover
interactions.delta: Coral pill button darkens / slight opacity shift on hover (transition-colors).

interactions.name: hero-phone-marquee-scroll
interactions.delta: Two rows of 8 iPhone mockups (Device-1..8.png) translate horizontally as the page scrolls (scroll-linked parallax marquee), top row drifts one way, masked with edge fade gradients.

interactions.name: sticky-feature-scroll
interactions.trigger: scroll through the 3 alternating feature rows (AI-Powered Scheduling / Smart Time Blocking / Predictive Event Planning)
interactions.delta: Each feature row pins its phone mockup sticky while text scrolls; phone fades/translates in on enter via reveal.

interactions.name: benefits-carousel
interactions.delta: Embla carousel: clicking next/prev arrows (circular buttons bottom-right) slides the 'what you can do with cal ai' phone cards horizontally; arrows disable at ends.

interactions.name: testimonials-vertical-marquee
interactions.delta: Four columns of testimonial cards scroll vertically at different speeds (animate-marquee-vertical, --duration linear infinite), masked top/bottom; alternating columns reverse direction; pauses on hover (group-hover:[animation-play-state:paused]).

interactions.name: feature-card-hover
interactions.delta: Icon tile / 'Learn more >' link subtle color transition on hover.

interactions.name: pricing-cta-hover
interactions.delta: Coral full-width pill buttons darken slightly, chevron icon.

interactions.name: faq-accordion
interactions.delta: Radix-style accordion: clicking a question toggles data-state open/closed, animates height (accordion-down/up keyframe to --radix-accordion-content-height), rotates the chevron, reveals the answer paragraph.

interactions.name: cta-floating-tweets
interactions.trigger: scroll into 'Stop wasting time on design.' CTA
interactions.delta: Rotated, faded tweet-style cards float behind the centered heart logo + CTA; rounded container with light gray bg.
